services.details: kimi.moonshot.cn redirected to kimi.com as expected (domain redirect confirmed). Page loaded with full chat UI. Text entered and submitted via multiple methods. UI showed no response change — initially interpreted as submission failure. However, Etap server logs (10:15~10:27) confirm 8+ kimi blocks during this test period, proving submissions DID go through and were intercepted by Etap APF. Kimi's chat API uses kimi.com POST requests routed via Cloudflare IPv6. Blocked responses cause Kimi UI to show no visible feedback (no error, no response).
services.evidence: Etap log: 8+ blocked requests from kimi.com between 10:15-10:27 during test. Domain redirect kimi.moonshot.cn -> kimi.com confirmed. DB domain_patterns updated: kimi.com,*.kimi.com,kimi.moonshot.cn,*.moonshot.cn.

notes: UPDATED from SUBMISSION_FAILED to BLOCKED based on Etap server log evidence. Kimi retest after DB domain fix successful — kimi.com domain now correctly matched and blocked. UI shows no visible feedback on block (silent failure from user perspective). Chat API uses kimi.com POST via Cloudflare IPv6.
